comments: b2 feeding at E Linton Bridge

Flew North over King's Road. Large raptor, noticeably bigger than a buzzard but definitely not as big as an Eagle. Flapping wings and occasionally soaring as a Carrion crow mobbed it. Due to the distance I couldn't make out the distinctive tail fork, but it's by far the most likely option.
Female seen in flight, brown head, grey back and white secondary patch on the wings.
